WHAT'S NEW

EFFECTIVE JULY 1
July 1, 2026
Pharmacists can now help with more conditions

Ontario is expanding what pharmacists can assess and prescribe for. Starting July 1, more of the everyday health concerns that used to mean a doctor's visit can be handled right here — often same day, no appointment or referral needed.

See what we can treat →
EFFECTIVE JULY 1
July 1, 2026
New publicly funded vaccines, right at the pharmacy

From July 1, additional publicly funded vaccines are available directly through pharmacies — no doctor's referral, and no cost for eligible patients. Ask us what you or your family now qualify for. Coming July 2026 — Expanded Publicly Funded Vaccines: Ontario pharmacists will soon be able to administer the following pub
